ddls:
CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation run */,
  "mean_fit_time" REAL /* Mean fit time for the model */,
  "std_fit_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of the fit time */,
  "mean_score_time" REAL /* Mean score time for the model */,
  "std_score_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of the score time */,
  "param_C" REAL /* Regularization parameter C */,
  "param_class_weight" TEXT /* Class weight parameter */,
  "param_dual" INTEGER /* Dual parameter for optimization */,
  "param_fit_intercept" INTEGER /* Whether to fit the intercept */,
  "param_max_iter" INTEGER /* Maximum number of iterations */,
  "param_multi_class" TEXT /* Multi-class strategy */,
  "param_penalty" TEXT /* Penalty type used in model */,
  "param_random_state" INTEGER /* Random state for reproducibility */,
  "param_tol" REAL /* Tolerance for stopping criteria */,
  "param_verbose" INTEGER /* Verbosity level of the solver */,
  "param_warm_start" INTEGER /* Warm start parameter */,
  "params" TEXT /* Serialized parameters for the evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used */,
  "hyperparameter_tuning_method" TEXT /* Method used for hyperparameter tuning */,
  "cross_validation_splits" INTEGER /* Number of cross-validation splits */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the evaluation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the evaluation */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "test_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "split_index" INTEGER /* Index of the data split used for testing */,
  "test_score" REAL /* Score achieved in the test split */,
  "test_score_type" TEXT /* Type of test score */,
  "test_score_description" TEXT /* Description of the test score metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roc_auc_scores" (
  "roc_auc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROC AUC score entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "roc_auc_mean" REAL /* Mean ROC AUC score across splits */,
  "roc_auc_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of ROC AUC scores */,
  "roc_auc_type" TEXT /* Type of ROC AUC score */,
  "roc_auc_description" TEXT /* Description of the ROC AUC score metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roc_auc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roc_auc_scores_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., Logistic Regression) */,
  "library" TEXT /* Library used for the model (e.g., Scikit-learn) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset (number of rows) */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public repository, internal data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user authentication */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for secure storage */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., create, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "config_parameters" TEXT /* Serialized parameters for the configuration */,
  "tuning_method" TEXT /* Method used for hyperparameter tuning */,
  "tuning_parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters used during tuning */,
  "tuning_description" TEXT /* Description of the tuning process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)
